mapper.select: SELECT review_id, topic_id, review_stage, reviewer_id, reviewer_role, reviewer_name, review_result, review_opinion, is_batch_review, batch_review_id, previous_status, new_status, is_modified, modified_by, modified_time, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM topic_review_record WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT review_id, topic_id, review_stage, reviewer_id, reviewer_role, reviewer_name, review_result, review_opinion, is_batch_review, batch_review_id, previous_status, new_status, is_modified, modified_by, modified_time, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM topic_review_record WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND review_stage = #{reviewStage} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic_review_record WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND deleted = 0
